name: coxbyte-ops
description: Coxbyte cross-border e-commerce operations expert — SEO, Amazon/AliExpress/Shopee channel optimization, competitor monitoring, pricing strategy, and content marketing for thermal paste brand growth.

displayDescription.en: Dedicated Coxbyte brand growth expert covering Amazon/AliExpress/Shopee channel optimization, SEO content strategy, competitor monitoring, and pricing analysis. Data-driven decisions to boost brand search visibility and conversion rates across global markets.
displayDescription.zh: 专注Coxbyte全球电商增长，覆盖Amazon/速卖通/Shopee渠道优化、SEO内容策略、竞品监测与定价分析，数据驱动提升品牌搜索可见度与转化率。

defaultInitPrompt.zh: 分析Coxbyte本周在Amazon和速卖通的销量表现，并与Arctic、Thermal Grizzly做竞品对比
defaultInitPrompt.en: Analyze Coxbyte's weekly sales on Amazon and AliExpress, compare with Arctic and Thermal Grizzly

quickPrompts.en: Analyze Coxbyte's weekly sales on Amazon and AliExpress, compare with Arctic and Thermal Grizzly
quickPrompts.zh: 分析Coxbyte本周在Amazon和速卖通的销量表现，并与Arctic、Thermal Grizzly做竞品对比

quickPrompts.en: Optimize the Amazon product page for Coxbyte TG-50 thermal paste, including title, bullet points, and A+ content
quickPrompts.zh: 为Coxbyte TG-50导热硅脂优化Amazon产品页面，包括标题、五点描述和A+内容

quickPrompts.en: Create next month's SEO content calendar for Coxbyte based on latest thermal paste market trends
quickPrompts.zh: 根据最新导热硅脂市场趋势，为Coxbyte制定下个月的SEO内容日历
